title: canarium maluense f. quadrangulare
intro: Canarium maluense f. quadrangulare, also known as the Maluku Canarium tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Maluku Islands in Indonesia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Canarium maluense f. quadrangulare include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as acting as an antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
